questions.q: What Canadian government agency has invited citizens to participate in a survey regarding the brightness of car headlights?
questions.correctText: Transport Canada is conducting a survey to gather feedback on car headlight glare and its potential safety risks.

questions.q: In which country did a Canadian individual recently face terrorism charges after a machete attack on a mosque?
questions.correctText: A Canadian man has been charged with terrorism after a machete attack at a mosque in Kenya.

questions.q: How long did it take a man in the Yukon to successfully grow a pineapple at home?
questions.correctText: A man in the Yukon successfully grew a pineapple at home, a process that took him nine years.

questions.q: According to a recent poll, what percentage of Canadians thought it would be a good idea for Canada to formally join the European Union?
questions.correctText: A survey by Spark Advocacy's polling arm found that one in four respondents (25%) thought it would be a good idea for Canada to formally join the European Union, with a further 58% indicating it was a proposal worth exploring.

questions.q: In the latest Liaison federal poll, which political party held a commanding 11-percentage-point lead?
questions.correctText: The latest Weekly Federal Tracker from Liaison Stratégies shows the Liberal Party maintaining an 11-percentage-point lead over the Conservatives.
